Recommendations

For the first message, try adding a bit of narrative, like “I said” or “you said” to avoid the bot speaking for you.

The length of your message will be the most important factor in determining the bot's response. If you don't want short messages, keep the length consistent.

For the bot to work, it is important to write extensively and in detail; the more you describe the scenarios, the greater the possibility of complex responses.

It is expected that this bot will not respond for User, but that fact cannot be completely assured. Remember that you can edit the answer or find a new one.

I'm a fan of creating original characters and also anime, if you have any suggestions for improvement, they are always welcome.
